title: Yahoo Finance, Business Insider and Investor Observer pick up Cryptool
content_html:
Cryptool was covered this week by Yahoo Finance, Business Insider Markets and Investor Observer.

The coverage is the start of a wider push, with a run of AMA sessions on partner channels lined up over the coming weeks to introduce the platform to a much larger audience.

For anyone running a crypto community that would benefit from a serious investment management platform, this is the moment to share Cryptool. The ambassador programme rewards everyone who brings new users in, and it is the most direct way to plug into the next stage of growth.
author: Cryptool
